zh.Keckwick, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾凱可維其可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Pichard於1106年出生在英國爾達頓時，她的父親Sir Nicholas Pichard40歲，母親Mrs. Nicholas Pickard37歲。她於大約1126年與Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton在英國爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1134年之後在英國英格蘭爾凱可維其可，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾達頓。

zh-hans.Keckwick, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾凱可維其可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice Pichard于1106年出生在英国爾達頓时，她的父亲Sir Nicholas Pichard40岁，母亲Mrs. Nicholas Pickard37岁。她于大约1126年与Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton在英国爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1134年之后在英国英格兰爾凱可維其可，埋葬在英国英格兰爾達頓。

nameMeanings.name: Pichard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Pritchard
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Rhisiart ‘son of Richard’(see Richard ).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Pichard was born in 1106, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir Nicholas Pichard, was 40 and her mother, Mrs. Nicholas Pickard, was 37. She married Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton about 1126, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died after 1134, in Keckwick, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Pichard est née en 1106, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Nicholas Pichard, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Nicholas Pickard, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton environ 1126, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée après 1134, à Keckwick, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice Pichard 1106 in Dutton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Nicholas Pichard 40 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Nicholas Pickard 37. Sie hat um 1126 in Cheshire, England Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1134 in Keckwick, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Pichard è nata il nel 1106 nel Dutton, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Sir Nicholas Pichard, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Nicholas Pickard, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton circa 1126, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì dopo il 1134, nel Keckwick, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Dutton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Pichardが1106年にイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas Pichardは40歳，母Mrs. Nicholas Pickardは37歳であった。約1126年にイギリスチェシュアイアでHugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Duttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1134年以後にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアケックウィックで死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Pichard(이)가 1106년 영국 체실르 드턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Pichard(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Nicholas Pickard(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 대략 1126년 영국 체실르에서 Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1134년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 케ck윅에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 드턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Pichard nasceu em 1106, em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Nicholas Pichard, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Nicholas Pickard, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton aproximadamente 1126, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu após 1134, em Keckwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Pichard родилась в 1106 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Nicholas Pichard было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Nicholas Pickard, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton около 1126 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла после 1134 г. в местности кекквикк, чешир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Alice Pichard nació en 1106, en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Nicholas Pichard, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Mrs. Nicholas Pickard, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton aproximadamente 1126, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió después de 1134, en Keckwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
